naming.FSOT_*: our product / ranking / pool oracle / brain

catalog.note: Solidify catalog form→gloss inventory (not FLORES sentence MT)

sense_identity.note: FSOT Language Second Brain: form↔sense↔lang under law pin

protocol_notes: Chat neural: Tatoeba-style held sample ≤200 sents/lang, best of local opus-mt / mul-en / NLLB
WMT14 de-en: full test n=3003 sacreBLEU; student hyps cached; FSOT product = ranking
FSOT_oracle_pool = best hyp already in pool (selection ceiling), not DeepL
Honest: FSOT news product slightly ranks above NLLB-3.3B single beam by multi-hyp pick — students still generate English

wmt14_deen.product_note: FSOT_pick_hardset ranks NLLB-3.3B multi-hyp pool; not from-scratch NMT

honesty.stage: v0.2.8 FSOT_pick_hardset 36.80; FSOT_oracle_pool 46.12; catalog 113; sense brain live
honesty.scientific_note: Measurable offline systems with pinned law + public protocols. Not delusion: numbers are reproducible; claims must stay within protocol (ranking ≠ from-scratch MT).
